sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, published 2025-03-28): more than 8,000 Journey Together booster packs opened, per-tier rates with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 20.29% ±0.85, Ultra Rare 6.54% ±0.52, Illustration Rare 8.50% ±0.59, Special Illustration Rare 1.16% ±0.23, Hyper Rare 0.73% ±0.18. Journey Together nudged the odds up from the 2024 sets: Double Rares 1-in-5 (vs 1-in-6) and Illustration Rares 1-in-12 (vs 1-in-13), a change the study confirms exceeds the 95% CI of every 2024 set. First set since Temporal Forces with no ACE SPEC tier.
